scripts.dev: node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/launch.mjs build local && wrangler dev --remote --local-protocol https --port 4331 --var PUBLIC_AUTH_BASE_URL:https://localhost:4331
scripts.wrangler: node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/launch.mjs build local && wrangler dev --remote --port 4331 --var PUBLIC_AUTH_BASE_URL:http://localhost:4331
scripts.wrangler:baseout: node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/launch.mjs build local && wrangler dev --remote --port 4331 --var PUBLIC_AUTH_BASE_URL:https://baseout.dev
scripts.deploy: node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/launch.mjs build && wrangler deploy --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.deploy:staging: CLOUDFLARE_ENV=staging node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/launch.mjs build && wrangler deploy --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.deploy:production: CLOUDFLARE_ENV=production node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/launch.mjs build && wrangler deploy --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.versions:upload:production: CLOUDFLARE_ENV=production node --env-file-if-exists=.env scripts/launch.mjs build && wrangler versions upload --config dist/server/wrangler.json
